top_findings.summary: The skill is described as building "scalable WebSocket servers for real-time bidirectional communication," but the detailed instructions and outputs focus extensively on designing and implementing REST API components, including resource models, HTTP endpoints, and general API development tasks. These actions are not directly necessary for building WebSocket servers, which primarily involve WebSocket protocol handling rather than RESTful API structures. This suggests the skill may perform actions beyond its stated primary purpose, potentially overreaching into unrelated API development areas.
